desc:
Up for sale is a 2003 Land Cruiser Prado in excellent condition, known for its legendary Toyota reliability and tough build. This Prado has a strong body, no mechanical issues at all, and has been very well maintained throughout its life. It drives beautifully and needs absolutely no money spent—just pay and drive.
✔ 8 months NSW Rego included
✔ Perfect for towing caravans thanks to its powerful engine and solid chassis
✔ Excellent for camping, off-roading, touring or daily driving
✔ Smooth, stable and extremely comfortable on long trips
✔ Clean interior, well-kept exterior and mechanically sound
Whether you're planning your next adventure or need a dependable family SUV, this Prado is ready to go anywhere you want. A truly worry‑free, turn‑key vehicle!
Don’t miss this opportunity to own a trusted Land Cruiser Prado that’s built to last.
